childRouter.note: ETH-in/ETH-out meta-router for plain child tokens (v1)

launchPadV1.note: DEPRECATED — deployed CreatorToken v1 (flat 3% fee, no burn, no sell tax)

launchPadV2.note: DEPRECATED — CreatorTokenV2 without pool-depth cap (auto-distribute can fail)

launchPad.note: Creator Economy factory v3 — CreatorTokenV2 with pool-depth capped auto-distribute

platformRouter.note: ETH-in/ETH-out with 0.5% ETH platform fee, for CreatorTokens

stakingVault.note: Lock OBSD, earn pro-rata share of platform fees via magnified dividends

feeAggregator.note: Harvests LP fees from Aerodrome pools, swaps to OBSD, feeds StakingVault

referralRegistry.note: On-chain referral tracking — referrers earn 5% of creator OBSD fees

moltbook.note: Claim URL sent to drlor. Post verification tweet to activate.
